2604.12633.title: Multilingual Multi-Label Emotion Classification at Scale with Synthetic Data
2604.12633.paper_summary: Emotion classification in multilingual settings remains constrained by the scarcity of annotated data: existing corpora are predominantly English, single-label, and cover few languages. We address this gap by constructing a large-scale synthetic training corpus of over 1M multi-label samples (50k per language) across 23 languages: Arabic, Bengali, Dutch, English, French, German, Hindi, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Mandarin, Polish, Portuguese, Punjabi, Russian, Spanish, Swahili, Tamil, Turkish, Ukrainian, Urdu, and Vietnamese, covering 11 emotion categories using culturally-adapted generation and programmatic quality filtering. We train and compare six multilingual transformer encoders, from DistilBERT (135M parameters) to XLM-R-Large (560M parameters), under identical conditions. On our in-domain test set, XLM-R-Large achieves 0.868 F1-micro and 0.987 AUC-micro. To validate against human-annotated data, we evaluate all models zero-shot on GoEmotions (English) and SemEval-2018 Task 1 E-c (English, Arabic, Spanish). On threshold-free ranking metrics, XLM-R-Large matches or exceeds English-only specialist models, tying on AP-micro (0.636) and LRAP (0.804) while surpassing on AUC-micro (0.810 vs. 0.787), while natively supporting all 23 languages. The best base-sized model is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/tabularisai/multilingual-emotion-classification
2604.12633.paper_summary_zh: 情感分類在多語言環境中仍然受到標註數據稀缺的限制：現有的語料庫主要是英語、單標籤，且涵蓋的語言較少。我們通過構建一個大型合成訓練語料庫來填補這一空白，該語料庫包含超過100萬個多標籤樣本（每種語言50,000個），涵蓋23種語言：阿拉伯語、孟加拉語、荷蘭語、英語、法語、德語、印地語、印尼語、意大利語、日語、韓語、普通話、波蘭語、葡萄牙語、旁遮普語、俄語、西班牙語、斯瓦希里語、泰米爾語、土耳其語、烏克蘭語、烏爾都語和越南語，涵蓋11個情感類別，使用文化適應生成和程式化質量過濾。我們在相同條件下訓練並比較了六個多語言Transformer編碼器，從DistilBERT（1.35億參數）到XLM-R-Large（5.6億參數）。在我們的內部測試集上，XLM-R-Large達到了0.868的F1微值和0.987的AUC微值。為了驗證與人類標註數據的對比，我們在GoEmotions（英語）和SemEval-2018任務1 E-c（英語、阿拉伯語、西班牙語）上對所有模型進行零樣本評估。在無閾值排名指標上，XLM-R-Large的表現與英語專家模型相匹配或超過，AP微值（0.636）和LRAP（0.804）持平，而在AUC微值上超過（0.810對0.787），同時原生支持所有23種語言。最佳基礎尺寸模型可在https://huggingface.co/tabularisai/multilingual-emotion-classification公開獲得。
2604.12633.author: Vadim Borisov et.al.
